reference: Hello Doctor, my sister-in-law has typhoid fever and she is experiencing chills right now. All the fans are switched off, and she has a double blanket on top of her, yet she is still shivering suddenly tonight. How can we alleviate this? What are the precautions to avoid shivering while having typhoid?
text: Hello, doctor. My sister-in-law has typhoid fever, and she is experiencing chills right now. All the fans are switched off, and she has a double blanket on top of her. Yet she is still shivering. Suddenly tonight, how can we alleviate this? What are the precautions to avoid shivering while having typhoid?
